creator: tzhuan@csie.org
text:
On Sat, Mar 31, 2012 at 11:30, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of math/fann,
>
> Please note that PR ports/166533 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/166533

Sure I approve it -- the PR is submitted by me.
Tz-Huan
